final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input in,
    output reg [7:0] out
);

    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst)
            out <= 8'b00000000;
        else
            out <= {out[6:0], in};
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
